query:
UPDATE applications SET approvedRiskProfile = CASE 
  WHEN approvedRiskProfile = 'low' THEN 'R1'
  WHEN approvedRiskProfile = 'medium' THEN 'R3'
  WHEN approvedRiskProfile = 'high' THEN 'R5'
  ELSE approvedRiskProfile
END
WHERE approvedRiskProfile IN ('low', 'medium', 'high');
